title: molecular_glue_allosteric_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS J3 output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/molecular_glue_allosteric_cross.py. CROSS-AXIS integration J3: the MOLECULAR-GLUE sub-axis (cooperative ternary-complex equilibrium from molecular_glue_sim.py) and the ALLOSTERIC sub-axis (MWC two-state from allosteric_sim.py) are unified as a TWO-STAGE process. Stage 1: the glue binds the E3 ligase and pays an allosteric cost to remodel its surface from native (T) to neo-interface-presenting (R) — an MWC R-state stabilisation. Stage 2: the cooperative ternary closes on the now-remodelled E3 — the standard mass-action partition function with cooperativity factor alpha. The staged free-energy decomposition reports dG_stage1 = dG_allo + dG_glue_E3 and dG_stage2 = dG_PPI + dG_coop with dG_total = dG_stage1 + dG_stage2. Structural anchor: lenalidomide-CRBN co-crystals (Petzold, Nature 532:127, 2016; Chamberlain, NSMB 21:803, 2014; Kronke, Science 343:301, 2014). Both sub-axis libraries are IMPORTED, not re-implemented (AGENTS.tape f3 — no shadow of sister logic). This is a MODEL-LEVEL UNIFICATION of two energetic accountings: the glue mechanism, in this framing, is allosteric-then-cooperative. NOT a claim that every molecular glue is purely allosteric — the bifunctional cooperative-ternary picture (Douglass 2013; Gadd 2017) remains the standard accounting. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2). MOLECULAR-GLUE remains a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main); ALLOSTERIC remains a SUB-AXIS :> QUANTUM (core); a CROSS is NOT a new axis. No quantity is derived from the n=6 lattice (f_lattice_fit / lattice-is-tool).

molecular_glue.description: Glue identifier inherited from the molecular_glue_sim deterministic GLUE_PANEL.

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the molecular-glue modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

valency.description: Molecular glues are monovalent by definition — no bivalent linker.

structural_anchor.description: Structural literature anchor for the glue-induced E3-ligase surface remodelling (e.g. lenalidomide-CRBN co-crystal Petzold 2016 / Chamberlain 2014 / Kronke 2014).

temperature_K.description: Reference temperature for the staged free-energy decomposition (K). Physiological 310 K.

rt_kcal_per_mol.description: Thermal energy RT (kcal/mol) at the reference temperature.

k_glue_nM.description: Glue dissociation constant to the partner it binds with appreciable affinity (nM). Imported from molecular_glue_sim.GLUE_PANEL.

k_ppi_nM.description: Bare target<->E3 protein-protein interface dissociation constant (nM, large for glue modality). Imported from molecular_glue_sim.GLUE_PANEL.

alpha_cooperativity.description: Cooperativity factor alpha amplifying the cooperative ternary closure (Douglass et al., JACS 135:6092, 2013). Imported from molecular_glue_sim.GLUE_PANEL.

stage1_allosteric_R_state_stabilisation.description: Stage-1 MWC R-state stabilisation of the E3 ligase by the glue. Apo populations from L = exp(dg_allo/RT); bound-state ledger dg_allo_bound = dg_allo + dg_glue_E3 re-evaluated through the same MWC two-state form. allosteric_sim.affinity_shift is imported and used verbatim (f3) to project the orthosteric affinity shift the R-state stabilisation produces.

dg_allo_kcal_per_mol.description: Apo allosteric remodelling cost — free energy to bring the E3 ligase from native (T) to neo-interface-presenting (R) conformation (kcal/mol). Positive for a glue-recruiting surface (T-dominant apo).

dg_glue_e3_kcal_per_mol.description: Intrinsic glue binding free energy to the E3 ligase pocket (kcal/mol). Negative = favourable. For lenalidomide this is the glutarimide-CRBN tri-Trp pocket grip (Petzold 2016 co-crystal).

dg_allo_bound_kcal_per_mol.description: Bound-state allosteric remodelling cost dg_allo + dg_glue_E3 (kcal/mol). The conformational free-energy ledger — the glue cannot escape paying the allosteric cost.

mwc_L_E3_apo.description: Apo MWC isomerisation constant L_E3 = [T]/[R] = exp(dg_allo/RT). Large for a glue-recruiting surface (T-dominant apo).

mwc_L_E3_bound.description: Bound-state MWC isomerisation constant L_E3^bound = exp(dg_allo_bound/RT). Small for a productive glue (R-dominant bound).

mwc_p_R_E3_apo.description: Apo R-state (remodelled, neo-interface-presenting) population P_R = 1/(1+L_E3). Small apo.

mwc_p_T_E3_apo.description: Apo T-state (native, non-recruiting) population P_T = L_E3/(1+L_E3). Equals 1 - P_R. Large apo.

mwc_p_R_E3_bound.description: Bound-state R-state population. Large (~1) for a productive glue.

mwc_p_T_E3_bound.description: Bound-state T-state population. Small (~0) for a productive glue. Equals 1 - P_R_bound.

population_shift_R.description: Population shift delta_P_R = P_R^bound - P_R^apo. Positive: glue shifts the E3 ensemble toward the R (remodelled) state — the MWC R-state stabilisation that creates the neo-interface BEFORE the cooperative ternary closes.

alpha_E3_population_shift.description: MWC-style cooperativity factor alpha_E3 = exp(-|dg_glue_E3|/RT) — the population-shift framing modelling choice (same as the G2 ALLOSTERIC x CRYPTIC-POCKET cross). alpha_E3 < 1 = R-state stabiliser.

allosteric_ceiling_shift_1_over_alpha.description: Saturable allosteric ceiling 1/alpha_E3 — the real-limit bound on the affinity shift (Christopoulos & Kenakin, Pharmacol. Rev. 54:323, 2002).

ec50_shift_ratio_at_glue_assay_conc.description: MWC affinity-shift ratio (1 + [B]/K_B) / (1 + alpha_E3*[B]/K_B) projected from allosteric_sim.affinity_shift (imported, not re-implemented — f3). Sits between 1 and 1/alpha_E3.

allosteric_ceiling_respected.description: True iff the projected MWC affinity shift respects the saturable ceiling 1/alpha_E3 — the hard real limit of allostery.

dg_stage1_kcal_per_mol.description: Stage-1 staged free-energy contribution: dG_stage1 = dg_allo + dg_glue_E3 (kcal/mol). The R-state stabilisation half of the staged decomposition.

glue_is_R_state_stabiliser.description: True iff population_shift_R > 0 — i.e. the glue's binding is an MWC R-state stabilisation on the E3 ligase. Required for every glue panel entry (X5 acceptance gate).

stage2_cooperative_ternary.description: Stage-2 cooperative ternary closure on the remodelled E3 ligase. Imports molecular_glue_sim.cooperative_ternary verbatim (f3 — no re-implementation); returns the full equilibrium dictionary plus dG_PPI = RT*ln(K_PPI/C0), dG_coop = -RT*ln(alpha), dG_stage2 = dG_PPI + dG_coop.

cooperative_ternary_equilibrium.description: Full equilibrium dictionary from molecular_glue_sim.cooperative_ternary (imported verbatim, f3). Contains f_ternary, f_binary_target, f_binary_ppi, f_free, partition_residual, glue_signature, etc.

dg_ppi_kcal_per_mol.description: Gibbs free-energy form of the bare target<->E3 protein-protein interface: dG_PPI = RT*ln(K_PPI[nM] / C0[nM]).

dg_coop_kcal_per_mol.description: Cooperativity free-energy contribution: dG_coop = -RT*ln(alpha). Negative for alpha > 1.

dg_stage2_kcal_per_mol.description: Stage-2 staged free-energy contribution: dG_stage2 = dG_PPI + dG_coop (kcal/mol). The cooperative-ternary half of the staged decomposition.

c0_reference_nM.description: Standard-state reference concentration for the dG_PPI conversion (nM). The same value across the panel — relative comparisons invariant to its choice.

dg_stage1_kcal_per_mol.description: Stage-1 staged free-energy contribution (kcal/mol). Mirror of stage1_allosteric_R_state_stabilisation.dg_stage1_kcal_per_mol for ease of acceptance gating.

dg_stage2_kcal_per_mol.description: Stage-2 staged free-energy contribution (kcal/mol). Mirror of stage2_cooperative_ternary.dg_stage2_kcal_per_mol for ease of acceptance gating.

dg_total_kcal_per_mol.description: Total staged free energy dG_total = dG_stage1 + dG_stage2 (kcal/mol). The sum of two honest parts of the same equilibrium — NOT a new parameterisation, NOT a fit.

staged_ledger_residual.description: Residual |dG_total - (dG_stage1 + dG_stage2)|. Must be ~0 to numerical precision — the staged ledger identity.

mwc_apo_unity_residual.description: Residual |P_R^apo + P_T^apo - 1|. MWC two-state populations sum to unity — must be ~0 to numerical precision.

mwc_bound_unity_residual.description: Residual |P_R^bound + P_T^bound - 1|. MWC two-state populations sum to unity — must be ~0 to numerical precision.

staged_unification_note.description: Plain-English summary of the staged mechanism: glue binds first, remodels E3 (stage-1 MWC R-state stabilisation), then cooperative ternary closes on the remodelled E3 (stage-2 mass-action with cooperativity).

illustrative_only.description: Always true — this row is a model-level unification of two energetic accountings of the same equilibrium. NOT a binding-affinity / potency / selectivity / therapeutic claim, NOT a claim that every molecular glue is purely allosteric.
